rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion To Compel Compliance And Further Response From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant One Rincon Hill Association To Defendant And Cross-Complainant'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One And Monetary Sanctions Against Association And It'S Attorney Of Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 08, 2016, line 11. Defendant'S Motion To Compel Compliance And Further Response From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant One Rincon Hill Association To Defendant And Cross-Complainant'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One And Monetary Sanctions Against Association And It'S Attorney Of Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to Request for Production 39. Responses to be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Motion is otherwise DENIED. Requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 08, 2016, line 2. Defendant Nellie Muganda'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition, Request For Appointment Of Discovery Referee At Plaintiffs Expense, And For Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to compel Disposition is granted, assuming the depositions have taken place on March 2, 2016 and March 4, 2016. Motion for Appointment of Referee is denied. = (501/REQ)
